rows.note: Style.font.b via get_style_for_cell / set_cell_style; round-trip re-read by styles_survive_xlsx_roundtrip.
Style.font.sz (i32 points); round-trip re-read by styles_survive_xlsx_roundtrip.
Style.fill.fg_color (hex); requires pattern_type = "solid"; round-trip re-read by styles_survive_xlsx_roundtrip.
Style.num_fmt (format code string); round-trip re-read by styles_survive_xlsx_roundtrip.
Style.border per-side BorderItem; a representative thin left border is set+read+round-tripped (borders_and_alignment_read_and_survive_roundtrip). Exhaustive border fidelity deferred to Round 2.
Model::get/set_row_height (f64); read back by row_col_sizes_settable and round-trip by styles_survive_xlsx_roundtrip.
No public merged-cells API on Model in 0.7 (absence documented by merges_and_conditional_formatting_absent_from_public_api; a call would not compile).
No conditional-formatting API in the public crate interface (absence documented by merges_and_conditional_formatting_absent_from_public_api).
INFERRED (not probed): set_cell_style_by_name / set_sheet_style exist; no general theme read API.
